title: CMA Annual Report and Accounts 2024 to 2025
body: "The Annual Report and Accounts give a summary of the Competition and Markets Authority’s performance for the period 1 April 2024 to 31 March 2025, including how we have risen to the challenge of supporting economic growth.  The CMA has also published its Impact Assessment for 2024 to 2025, from which the figures for financial benefits to consumers are derived. "
